messages.content:
请创建一个完整的 HTML5 游戏。游戏描述：增加一个AI对手。
                    
重要技术要求：
1. 单个 HTML 文件
2. 使用 Canvas API
3. Canvas 尺寸必须为 360x640 像素（9:16 竖屏比例）
4. 在 JavaScript 中设置：canvas.width = 360; canvas.height = 640;
5. 在 CSS 中设置：canvas { max-width: 100%; height: auto; display: block; margin: 0 auto; }
6. 包含完整游戏循环
7. 有得分系统
8. 确保有趣可玩

只返回 HTML 代码，不要其他说明。

modifications.prompt:
请创建一个完整的 HTML5 游戏。游戏描述：增加一个AI对手。
                    
重要技术要求：
1. 单个 HTML 文件
2. 使用 Canvas API
3. Canvas 尺寸必须为 360x640 像素（9:16 竖屏比例）
4. 在 JavaScript 中设置：canvas.width = 360; canvas.height = 640;
5. 在 CSS 中设置：canvas { max-width: 100%; height: auto; display: block; margin: 0 auto; }
6. 包含完整游戏循环
7. 有得分系统
8. 确保有趣可玩

只返回 HTML 代码，不要其他说明。
modifications.code:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>Pong with AI</title>
    <style>
        * {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }
        body {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            min-height: 100vh;
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, #1a1a2e 0%, #16213e 100%);
            font-family: 'PingFang SC', 'Microsoft YaHei', sans-serif;
        }
        canvas {
            max-width: 100%;
            height: auto;
            display: block;
            margin: 0 auto;
            border-radius: 12px;
            box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4);
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <canvas id="gameCanvas"></canvas>
    <script>
        const canvas = document.getElementById('gameCanvas');
        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
        canvas.width = 360;
        canvas.height = 640;

        // Game states
        const MENU = 'menu';
        const PLAYING = 'playing';
        const PAUSED = 'paused';
        const GAMEOVER = 'gameover';
        let gameState = MENU;

        // Game variables
        let playerPaddle, aiPaddle, ball;
        let playerScore = 0, aiScore = 0;
        let highScore = localStorage.getItem('pongHighScore') || 0;
        let lastTime = 0;
        let keys = {};

        // Paddle class
        class Paddle {
            constructor(x, y, width, height, isPlayer = false) {
                this.x = x;
                this.y = y;
                this.width = width;
                this.height = height;
                this.speed = 5;
                this.isPlayer = isPlayer;
                this.targetY = y;
            }

            update(deltaTime) {
                if (this.isPlayer) {
                    if (keys['ArrowLeft'] || keys['a']) {
                        this.x -= this.speed;
                    }
                    if (keys['ArrowRight'] || keys['d']) {
                        this.x += this.speed;
                    }
                    // Keep paddle within bounds
                    this.x = Math.max(0, Math.min(canvas.width - this.width, this.x));
                } else {
                    // AI paddle movement
                    const aiSpeed = 4;
                    if (ball.y < this.y + this.height / 2) {
                        this.targetY = ball.y - this.height / 2;
                    } else {
                        this.targetY = ball.y - this.height / 2;
                    }
                    // Smooth AI movement
                    const diff = this.targetY - this.y;
                    this.y += diff * 0.1;
                    // Keep AI paddle within bounds
                    this.y = Math.max(0, Math.min(canvas.height - this.height, this.y));
                }
            }

            draw() {
                ctx.fillStyle = this.isPlayer ? '#4fd1c5' : '#ff6b6b';
                ctx.beginPath();
                ctx.roundRect(this.x, this.y, this.width, this.height, 6);
                ctx.fill();
            }
        }

        // Ball class
        class Ball {
            constructor(x, y, radius) {
                this.x = x;
                this.y = y;
                this.radius = radius;
                this.speedX = 4;
                this.speedY = 4;
                this.reset();
            }

            reset() {
                this.x = canvas.width / 2;
                this.y = canvas.height / 2;
                this.speedX = (Math.random() > 0.5 ? 1 : -1) * 4;
                this.speedY = (Math.random() > 0.5 ? 1 : -1) * 4;
            }

            update(deltaTime) {
                this.x += this.speedX;
                this.y += this.speedY;

                // Bounce off top and bottom
                if (this.y - this.radius < 0 || this.y + this.radius > canvas.height) {
                    this.speedY *= -1;
                }

                // Bounce off paddles
                if (this.checkCollision(playerPaddle) || this.checkCollision(aiPaddle)) {
                    this.speedX *= -1;
                    // Increase speed slightly
                    this.speedX *= 1.05;
                    this.speedY *= 1.05;
                }

                // Score points
                if (this.x - this.radius < 0) {
                    aiScore++;
                    this.reset();
                } else if (this.x + this.radius > canvas.width) {
                    playerScore++;
                    this.reset();
                }

                // Check for game over
                if (playerScore >= 5 || aiScore >= 5) {
                    if (playerScore > highScore) {
                        highScore = playerScore;
                        localStorage.setItem('pongHighScore', highScore);
                    }
                    gameState = GAMEOVER;
                }
            }

            checkCollision(paddle) {
                return this.x - this.radius < paddle.x + paddle.width &&
                       this.x + this.radius > paddle.x &&
                       this.y - this.radius < paddle.y + paddle.height &&
                       this.y + this.radius > paddle.y;
            }

            draw() {
                ctx.fillStyle = '#ffffff';
                ctx.beginPath();
                ctx.arc(this.x, this.y, this.radius, 0, Math.PI * 2);
                ctx.fill();
            }
        }

        // Initialize game
        function initGame() {
            playerPaddle = new Paddle(canvas.width / 2 - 40, canvas.height - 30, 80, 15, true);
            aiPaddle = new Paddle(canvas.width / 2 - 40, 15, 80, 15, false);
            ball = new Ball(canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2, 10);
            playerScore = 0;
            aiScore = 0;
        }

        // Update function
        function update(deltaTime) {
            if (gameState === PLAYING) {
                playerPaddle.update(deltaTime);
                aiPaddle.update(deltaTime);
                ball.update(deltaTime);
            }
        }

        // Render function
        function render() {
            // Clear canvas
            ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

            // Draw background
            const gradient = ctx.createLinearGradient(0, 0, 0, canvas.height);
            gradient.addColorStop(0, '#1a1a2e');
            gradient.addColorStop(1, '#16213e');
            ctx.fillStyle = gradient;
            ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

            // Draw center line
            ctx.strokeStyle = '#ffffff20';
            ctx.setLineDash([10, 10]);
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(0, canvas.height / 2);
            ctx.lineTo(canvas.width, canvas.height / 2);
            ctx.stroke();
            ctx.setLineDash([]);

            // Draw paddles and ball
            if (gameState === PLAYING || gameState === PAUSED) {
                playerPaddle.draw();
                aiPaddle.draw();
                ball.draw();
            }

            // Draw score
            ctx.fillStyle = '#ffffff';
            ctx.font = '20px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
            ctx.textAlign = 'center';
            ctx.fillText(`Player: ${playerScore}  AI: ${aiScore}`, canvas.width / 2, 30);

            // Draw high score
            ctx.fillStyle = '#4fd1c5';
            ctx.font = '16px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
            ctx.fillText(`High Score: ${highScore}`, canvas.width / 2, 55);

            // Draw game state overlays
            if (gameState === MENU) {
                drawOverlay('PONG AI', 'Press SPACE to Start', 'Use Arrow Keys or A/D to Move');
            } else if (gameState === PAUSED) {
                drawOverlay('PAUSED', 'Press P to Resume', 'Press Q to Quit');
            } else if (gameState === GAMEOVER) {
                const winner = playerScore >= 5 ? 'You Win!' : 'AI Wins!';
                drawOverlay(winner, 'Press SPACE to Restart', 'Press Q for Menu');
            }
        }

        // Draw overlay for menus and messages
        function drawOverlay(title, subtitle1, subtitle2) {
            ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.7)';
            ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

            ctx.fillStyle = '#ffffff';
            ctx.font = 'bold 36px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
            ctx.textAlign = 'center';
            ctx.fillText(title, canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2 - 40);

            ctx.font = '20px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
            ctx.fillText(subtitle1, canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2 + 10);

            ctx.font = '16px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
            ctx.fillStyle = '#4fd1c5';
            ctx.fillText(subtitle2, canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2 + 40);
        }

        // Input handling
        function handleInput(key, pressed) {
            keys[key] = pressed;

            if (pressed) {
                if (gameState === MENU && key === ' ') {
                    initGame();
                    gameState = PLAYING;
                } else if (gameState === PLAYING && key === 'p') {
                    gameState = PAUSED;
                } else if (gameState === PAUSED && key === 'p') {
                    gameState = PLAYING;
                } else if (gameState === PAUSED && key === 'q') {
                    gameState = MENU;
                } else if (gameState === GAMEOVER && key === ' ') {
                    initGame();
                    gameState = PLAYING;
                } else if (gameState === GAMEOVER && key === 'q') {
                    gameState = MENU;
                }
            }
        }

        // Event listeners for keyboard input
        document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
            handleInput(e.key, true);
        });
        document.addEventListener('keyup', (e) => {
            handleInput(e.key, false);
        });

        // Game loop
        function gameLoop(currentTime) {
            const deltaTime = (currentTime - lastTime) / 1000;
            lastTime = currentTime;

            update(deltaTime);
            render();

            requestAnimationFrame(gameLoop);
        }

        // Start the game
        initGame();
        requestAnimationFrame(gameLoop);
    </script>
</body>
</html>
